headline: Generac Targets Data Center Growth With New High Capacity Diesel Units
summary: Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) has introduced its new SD1250 and SD1500 industrial diesel generators for mission critical applications. The products are aimed at data centers, healthcare providers, utilities, and industrial facilities that require resilient backup power. The SD1250 and SD1500 focus on reliability, efficiency, and sustainability as part of Generac’s broader integrated energy solutions lineup. Generac Holdings, trading at around $199.31, is expanding its industrial product...
